items.evidence: Button calling setError('Assignment type updated.') deleted from Assignment tab action row. No UI element implies assignment type editing remains.

items.check: Duplicate termination actions consolidated into single Vacate Position (fp-5, ui-1)
items.evidence: Replaced 'End assignment' + 'Mark as vacant' (identical handlers) with single 'Vacate position' button with microcopy: 'End the current assignment and make this position vacant.'

items.check: OrgReadyBanner CTA deep-links to Assignment tab with first field focused (fp-14, dn-10)
items.evidence: onAssignPerson now calls: setActiveNav('org'), setPositionPanelTab('assignment'), dismisses banner, then focuses assignPersonSelectRef via 80ms deferred focus. Zero additional clicks required.

items.check: Position creation auto-focus consistent — form path behaves like hover-insert path (fp-8)
items.evidence: handleCreatePosition now calls setFocusPositionId(created.id) and setPositionPanelTab('position') after API success, matching handleQuickInsertPosition behaviour at lines 1435-1436.

items.check: Workflow tabs numbered with Lucide icons: 1 Structure / 2 Assign / 3 Evidence (fp-9, dn-3)
items.evidence: Tab row replaced with pill-style numbered tabs using LayoutGrid/UserCheck/FileText Lucide icons. Active state uses white card + blue accent + bold text. Step number + icon + label per tab.

items.check: Misleading non-persisted fields hidden (fp-1): assignment type select, start/end date inputs, salary field
items.evidence: Assignment type select, start date input, end date input, and salary input removed from Assignment tab. Only the person selector (the only persisted field) and action buttons remain.

items.check: Assignment tab has current occupant summary card when position is filled
items.evidence: Green summary card showing person initials + full name + 'Active assignment' label renders above person selector when selectedAssignment is truthy.

items.check: Assignment tab has vacancy warning when position is empty
items.evidence: Amber warning banner 'This position is vacant. Assign a person below.' renders when selectedAssignment is null.

items.check: Primary action button has clear visual hierarchy (blue gradient, shadow)
items.evidence: Assign/Reassign person button uses gradient #2563EB→#1D4ED8 with 0 2px 8px rgba(37,99,235,0.25) shadow when enabled. Disabled state uses neutral #E2E8F0.

items.check: Vacate position termination action has clear microcopy explaining consequence
items.evidence: Rendered as card-style button: title 'Vacate position' + subtitle 'End the current assignment and make this position vacant.' Only visible when selectedAssignment is truthy.

items.check: Person select has labelled id for accessibility and programmatic focus
items.evidence: select has id='assign-person-select' + htmlFor label + ref={assignPersonSelectRef} for deep-link focus.

items.check: No editable field may imply persistence if persistence does not exist
items.evidence: All removed fields (type, dates, salary) were client-only state that was silently dropped on API call. No such fields remain in the Assignment tab.
